conservative.name: Spectral Wolf
conservative.requirements: 8 favour, Strength 4+, you and you allies must be outnumbered in battle

success.description: A huge white wolf appears in the engagement of your choice within medium range. The wolf counts as an ally and is under your control. On your turn, the wolf can make 1 manoeuvre for free, and can make additional manoeuvres by discarding recharge tokens from this card. If the wolf is attacked, do not roll dice -simply discard a recharge token from this card. Your allies engaged with the wolf gain +1 defence. Attacks against enemies engaged with the wolf gain

sigmarsComet.description: Attacks against enemies engaged with the wolf gain " +1 critical"

reckless.name: Spectral Wolf
reckless.requirements: 8 favour, Strength 4+, you and your allies must be outnumbered in battle

success.description: A huge white wolf appears in the engagement of your choice within medium range. The wolf counts as an ally and is under your control. On your turn, the wolf can make 1 manoeuvre for free, and can make additional manoeuvres by discarding recharge tokens from this card. If the wolf is attacked, do not roll dice -simply discard a recharge token from this card. When you make a Melee Attack, you may choose to do so as if you were in the wolf's position, rather than your own

boon.description: Successful attacks made through the wolf gain +1 damage

sigmarsComet.description: Successful attacks made through the wolf gain +1 critical
